Notice
This article is about a clan that has been tagged dead. Any info is to be considered purely of historical value. Feel free to correct any inaccuracies.
'''42''' ('''[42]''') (July 2004 - November 2005) was one of the most important clans in LieroX history. 42 clan members were not very active in game but they contributed a lot to LieroX community outside the servers. They made several popular levels, mods and skins people are still playing and using today. Members of the 42 clan were local moderators for LieroX section in [[Gaming Universe]] as well as OPs in LieroX IRC channel. They were helping [[JasonB]] with the development of LieroX and also hosting their own LieroX portal with forums - [[LieroX.net]] . == History == Clan was born as a merger between [[Heh|heh]] and [[Erm|erm]] in July 2004. Clan's activity stopped in September 2005 when members of the clan would start claiming they are waiting for new version of LieroX to be released. After the release of newer version activity in game has risen but only for a shorter period. Although clan was never declared dead there was next to impossible to notice a 42 clan member in game after late Fall of 2005. KOH was the only member who would every now and then play the game until he finally gave up in September 2006. == Members == === Leader === * [[Strider]] === Co-Leaders === * [[Blackninja]] * Gliptic * TTFTCUTS === Normal members === * C3M * Enigma/Tizzle * Gemini * Galamoth * [[HocusPocus]] * JiMMu * LMX * [[MasterOfHyrule]] * MrEvil * Nutsoman * Ragzouken == Clan Wars == === Tied === * [42] vs [RIP] (1:1) == External links == * [http://www.thegaminguniverse.com/forums/showthread.php?t=16072 42 GU thread 1] * [http://www.thegaminguniverse.com/forums/showthread.php?t=27521 42 GU thread 2] [[Category:Clans]] [[Category:Retired clans]]

revision.comment: Imported from Internet Archive Wayback Machine
revision.text:
== General information == '''Aegir''', referred as '''Krystal''' in the [/forum/ Liero Xtreme Alliance], is a [http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sweden Swedish] Liero Xtreme player who has been playing the game since late Summer 2006. He has been in several clans, including [[Viking Invincible Pantheon|VIP]], [[Annuit Coeptis|aC]], [[Men of Valor|(V)]], [/forum/index.php/topic,1732.0.html T3], etc. He is currently taking part of the clan [[Like a Boss]].
== Personal information == Real life name - Sebastian Lindersson. Gender - Male. Born - September the 16th, 1992. Appearance - Brown, mid-long hair, quite tall, middle weight. Behavior - Nice person who usually expresses himself as a fool at some points. Can be really serious at times as well. Started to play Liero Xtreme - 2006 Interests - Going to gym, play games, watch [http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Anime anime], usual stuff.
== History == Aegir started to play with various nicknames, like '''Mr. White''', '''Ninja Guardian''' and other cool-looking nicknames, in 2006. He enjoyed to play a lot of [[Mortars|mortars]] because that was the only thing he could access. He learned fairly quickly to use [[Combo|combo]]. At the same time, his brother who was in the clan T$P, bothered him a lot. Because there was only one computer available, his brother played a lot more often. However, his brother met up with [[Lodur|OP]] and they became good friends. When T$P fell apart, OP left to join the clan sfm and it was time for Aegir to make an appearance. He kept playing mortars and later on befriended Mashkito, the leader of sfm, and also OP. He joined |sfm| as '''Cruncher''' slightly before OP left to join Finno-12. It was by that time that Aegir wanted to compete with OP to become the better player. He started to play even more mortars. It was around then when he met one of his loyal friends '''Evilninja''', later known as '''Svipdag''' and Quaqa. They started to play much together.
In the late Fall the same year, he discovered another playable mod in LX - [[Liero 1.0|Liero v.10 100% loading time]]. He thought that it was awesome, so he started to search for such servers. There was a server he was very fund of, which was hosted by [[RIP|Screams]] from the clan RIP. Screams let him play in his server as much as he liked, despites that the more comfortable players didn't like it. One time, he was alone with many players from RIP. Screams advertised him about Liero Xtreme Alliance, which was a kind of a new community. Chruncher didn't really appreciate it though, but kept playing Liero v1.0.
In the early 2007, Loke, Achilles and [[Lodur]] invited him to join VIP - Viking Invincible Pantheon. It was the first clan that had invited him, and it was a clan that played Liero v1.0 as well. He joined the clan, but for one circumstance - That he had to change his Liero Xtreme nickname into a Norse God. That was then the name Aegir was given to the player.
== Nickname history == Here is a list of some nicknames the player has been using.
Chronically ordered
* Cruncher - Inspired from a muesli pack and from a [http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pok%C3%A9mon Pokemon] move called ''Crunch''. * Aegir - The name was recieved before joining VIP. It was later discovered that there was already two other players using the same nickname when they were active in VIP. * Krystal - Both swapping the ''Ch'' to a ''K'' in the word ''Chrystal'' and using the same name as the character [http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_characters_in_the_Star_Fox_series#Krystal Krystal] from the Star Fox franchise. * Aeg0r - After leaving VIP, he wanted to do something really cool with his nickname, so he changed the ''I'' into a ''0'' (zero). '' zt0n - Simply put: Stön (Eng. Groan) -> Ston (No usage of extended letters in Liero xtreme) -> zton -> zt0n ''(The number* 0 ''for coolness).'' * Sebbe - His real-life nickname. It's become quite popular among other players. * Random nicknames - Sometimes he uses various nicknames because of ''undercovering'', current interests and so on.
[[Category:Players]] [[Category:Sweden]]
<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721182756/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/Aegir -->

'''Ancient Millenium Warriors''' ('''(AMW)''') (December 2004 - July 2005) was a strictly 100 % loading time playing clan made as a merger of [[Millenium Warriors]] and [[Ancient Warriors]]. == History == Clan was made by -Liquid-, Andy Tran and Miniman as a merger between [[Millenium Warriors]] and [[Ancient Warriors]]. After a certain period clan got very inactive, most likely the only active player was Loop who left AMW to join HW in end of June 2005. == Members == === Leaders === * -Liquid- * Andy Tran * Miniman === Normal members === * FragCrazy * Loop * MaDDoG * ReddPuke * Stiltzkin == Clan Wars == N/A == External links == * [http://www.thegaminguniverse.com/forums/showthread.php?t=19738 Ancient Millenium Warriors GU thread] [[Category:Clans]] [[Category:Retired clans]]

'''Angels of Death''' ('''{AOD}''') (June/July 2004 - 9th of August 2006) == History == When [[User Asrack|Asrack]] changed his name to hide away from some people, him and [[Sirus]] made a new clan to play what ever they wanted. They played 40% loading time with just a bunch of friends. Soon to come to the clan and change it was [[Magus]]. Magus made the clan a [[Rifles|rifles]] and [[Limited|limited]] playing clan. AOD clan still played their beloved 40 lt, but it was slowly changing. Eventually they took the clan to [[Gaming Universe]] and after a few clan wars, Asrack and [[Magus]] joined [[Let's Cheat Death]], which meant the end of Angels of Death. == Members == === Leader === * [[User Asrack|Asrack]] === Co-Leaders === * [[Magus]] * [[Sirus]] * Azriath * [[Nirac]] === Normal members === * AnBu * MaGe * Mech * Sandman * Superman * Wataglue == Clan Wars == === Won === * {AOD} vs /IRW/ (2:0) * {AOD} vs TbfC.ee | (2:0) === Loss === * {AOD} vs [RIP] (0:2) == External links == Coming soon. revision.text:
Notice
This article is about a clan that is considered active. Any featured information may be outdated due to events in the clan. Feel free to correct any inaccuracies.
'''annuit Coeptis''' ('''[aC]''') == Thin Story == Annuit Coeptis was created in September 2006 by Legend, Thor, Kyudo and Miku. The clan developed fast and when it had been up for 3 months it got voted into the Alliance by clans like [Osp], [AoG] and [OwZ]. The clan's success came to an end in June 2007 when suddenly a lot of members left the clan, and this led to [aC]'s sudden death. A few months passed by, the former members of [aC], Thor and Lodur were denied membership to the [Uw] clan. At that point they got the idea to ressurect [aC] and they managed to withdraw Legend from [Uw]. In October 2007, those three players - together with Lablad aka. Luffy rebuilded the Annuit Coeptis ruins and a second era was a fact. One highlight during the second era is deffinately when [aC] clashed with [FoH] in one of the bloodiest battles between clans the LieroVerse, and today it's hard to imagine another scenario like it will occur again, especially since [FoH] is inactive. In June 2008, a lot of members were fed up with the current crew's currently arguing inside the clan, those argues is however just one of many reasons why the members decided to close down [aC] once again. Thor, Legend, Luffy and Xandoz from [aC] formed a new pack with the former [Uw] members Flare, oSq, Agn. Together they created what would later on be one of LieroX's strongest clans, [WvW] - World of vanishing Warriors. Time passed by, and in April 2009 the two strong clans {Q} and ~A~ suddenly died. Thor from ~A~ and Lodur from {Q} wanted to stick together once again and together with the former {Q} profiles SorZ and Jage, they decided to give a last shot at [aC], and the third era was a fact the 26th of April 2009. Since then, the clan goes strong. A few members has left and a few new players have joined since April 2009, one of the most remarkable recruitments for the third era is Legend, who dropped out from his creation [WvW] back to his roots: [aC] - Annuit Coeptis. = Players (2009-2011) = === Members === * [aC] Anni * [aC] Filmons * [aC] [[Lodur]] * [aC] Puni" * [aC] Slim * [aC] [[SorZ]] ===== Trial Members ===== * (aC) O"Neill === Honorary Members === * [aC] Cumiques. * [aC] [[Legend]] * [aC] Luffy * [aC] rambake * [aC] Thor ==== Former Members ==== * [aC] Jage (Retired) * [aC] Karma. (Kicked) * [aC] magma (Kicked) * [aC] Cizin| (Retired) * [aC] Lucifer" (Retired) ==== Former Trials ==== Mashkito, druFF, Iliera, T-Bag, Hermod == Members between 2006-2008 == Legend, Luffy, Thor, Lodur, Mashkito, druFF, Aegir, Hermod, QuiverZ, Vux, Xandoz, Blade, Aerius, Tafka, MooSe, Barthalomew, Dread, Yehaa, Duality, Loke, DeD, DreaM, Miku, Trust, Kyudo, Villetys, Flip, Howdy, Ypsilon, TeddyKGB, Data, PiipqU, Durza = Clanwars = === Results === Both current and old stats can be found [/forum/index.php/board,139.0.html here.] === Settings === * Loading Time: 20%-100% * Mods: Most of them, but preferable Liero v1.0 * Levels: All standard levels, with some exceptions = Related Links = === Current === * [aC] 2009-2011 [/forum/index.php/board,122.0.html Clan board at LXA] === Old === * [aC] 2007-2008 [http://lxalliance.net/forum/index.php/topic,7340.0.html Clan thread at LXA] * [aC] 2006-2007 [/forum/index.php/topic,2356.0.html Clan thread at LXA] [[Category:Clans]]

'''Army of Glory''' ('''[AoG]''') = History = The weather is a bit warmer in Europe than it usually is, however some people were thinking for weeks to make something new, something unique for Liero Extreme. Then, ~ALT~ and Vp came up with an idea. What about making a new clan? So they decided to merge, and here we go: [AoG] Most of its players have played with Liero Extreme for a long time, and we hope, each of us will be apart of a great Team:). December 27 2006...- by the founders. == Dates == * January: Z01 leaves because of his real life problems, the other "leader" is away, so the clan nearly dies, everyone leaves,at the end Gyogyi, and Caldeth remain. * April: After being quiet for a month the clan takes a big blow, members decided to come back, finally everything is seeming to be nice and cool. * 11th of May: Cl!FF comes back to lierox and joins the clan. * 18thof May: Thomas joins the clan. * 9-14th of July: Pelimies and Worminator leave the clan, on their own, however the friendship stays. * 24th of July: Tafka begins his test period as the only trial in the clan. * Late August: Pelimies rejoins to the clan, Virtue gets kicked. * First week of September: Tafkas Trial period ends. * 27th of September: Worminator rejoins. * 7th of October: Army of Glory, becomes an LXA Allied clan. * 23rd of November: SoUa joins [AoG] as a trail. * 19th of January: Pelimies leaves [AoG]. * 14th of February: SoUa passed the trail and is promoted to a full member, we also have a new trail member, [AoG]ninjalewter. = Members = All currently active members are found here, retired members will be placed on there own. == Founders/Leaders == * [AoG]'SL'''Gyogyi'' * [AoG] ->Z01<- == Co-Leaders == * [AoG]'PK'Ahmed(Legendkiller) == Messiah == * [AoG] St. Bakker (Bakker_182) == Normal members == * [AoG]‚ÄôAR‚ÄôTyrael * [AoG]'wn'Caldeth * [AoG]'FQ' Twister * [AoG]'DJ'Cl!FF * [AoG]'HP'Thomas * [AoG] Worminator/ straight Fairy * [AoG] Kunoichi * [AoG] Tiger * [AoG] SoUa == Retired Members == * [AoG] Pelimies == Old Members == * [AoG] RIPA = Hosts = == [AoG] Z01 == * Size: For 8 players normally. * Server IP: Static * Location: The Netherlands * Server Details:8 Mbit, 100lt games, == [AoG]''Gyogyi'' == * Size: For 5-6 players * Server IP: Dynamic * Location: Hungary * Server Details:2 Mbit, Both 20lt and 100lt games == [AoG] Legendkiller == * Size: For 8 players * Server IP: Ultra Dynamic * Location: Canada * Server Details: 10mbps , 100lt games(multimod), 20lt if seriously asking me. == [AoG] Caldeth == * Size: For 4 players * Server IP: Dynamic * Location: Estonia * Server Details: Both 20lt and 100lt games == [AoG] Twister == * Size: For 8 players * Server IP: Dynamic * Location: Finland * Server Details: Mostly 100lt games == [AoG] Cl!FF == * Size: For 8 players * Server IP: Stable * Location: The Netherlands * Server Details: Mostly 100lt games == [AoG] Thomas == * Size: For 8 players * Server IP: Dynamic * Location: Poland * Server Details: Both 20lt and 100lt games == [AoG] Worminator == This is a collection of articles about Liero, LieroX and OpenLieroX.
== Liero reviews == TIGSource (independent gaming news) with a side note about OpenLieroX: <http://tigsource.com/articles/2008/05/14/multiplayer-on-one-keyboard-6-lier-um-yeah>
Powermagazine: <http://powermagazine.liero.be/>
== OpenLieroX reviews == LinuxTidBits: <http://linuxtidbits.wordpress.com/2008/03/31/upcoming-games-openlierox/>
nice history about OpenLieroX: <http://www.lanthrax.com/news_details.asp?NewsID=01381>
BigDownload / GameDaily: <http://news.bigdownload.com/2009/09/04/freeware-friday-openlierox/>
small review of OpenLieroX in Powermagazine: <http://powermagazine.liero.be/2007-POWER-7.pdf>
one of the most respected Linux magazine in CZ about OLX (about OLX itself, not refered to Liero): <http://www.root.cz/clanky/openlierox-nebezpecni-cervici/>
== Other references == Jason Boettchers LieroX source code release: <http://www.thegaminguniverse.com/forums/showthread.php?t=28565>
Ohloh OpenLieroX code analysis: <https://www.ohloh.net/p/openlierox/analyses/latest>
== Part of collections == Liero, LieroX or OpenLieroX are often noted in some overview about a collections of games.
Open Source Worms Clones overview with OpenLieroX: <http://techwoo.com/open-source-artillery-worms-clones/>
== Game dictionaries == Some game dictionary entries are notable. Note that this is not meant as a complete list, just some noteable entries should be listed here.
LinuxLinks: <http://www.linuxlinks.com/article/20080524122016281/OpenLieroX.html>
== Hackontest == Hackontest was a coding contest in 2008 where OpenLieroX took part.

Bruce Perens summary: <http://technocrat.net/d/2008/9/25/50176/>
German summary about OpenExpo: <http://www.openexpo.ch/openexpo-2008-zuerich/presse/>
very short German summary: <http://www.swissitmagazine.ch/software/backend-sw/articles/164817/?icmp=aut-artikel-artikel>

revision.text:
This clan was started by Bart and QuiverS in the year of 2011.
Introduction Due to inactivity of Bart and QuiverS former LX-partners, aka members/friends of WvW, AND due to lack of drama within LXA lately, QuiverS and Bart decided to head for new directions. These new directions , more specifically, withhold the beginning of a new duo-clan, which will be named after two very remarkable players in LieroX: the name will be [bkS]. Up to you to find out who this is about! ;-)
They knew that it may have looked like they were letting down our former clanmembers, and in a way they were, I guess, but I think none of you shall invalidate the fact that WvW had been very inactive lately and consisted mainly just of QuiverZ and Bart, so they figured they might as well go without them.
Bart and QuiverS would as well like to thank all of these people, for giving them a great time and the experience to take on their own little project here. They do hope to remain good friends and to meet everyone on the battlefield.
DUTCH FORCES , be saluting you,
FreY and QuiverS
After they made the clan they recruited players like Iliera, Slako, Filmonss, Lucifer, Perkele and Pure. Now in the year of 2014, the clan exists of six members. Bart, Kevin, Slako, Iliera, Filmonss and Pure.
bkS is now one heck of a succesful and united clan, that has won many matches against other clans, with six individually skilled players with great teamwork.(2014)
iliera joins as a trial
iliera gets full membership
slako joins as a trial
slako gets full membership
Perkele joins bkS as a trial
Filmons joins bkS as a trial
Filmons and Perkele get full membership
Slako leaves the clan to join R
Lucifer joins bkS
Lucifer, Perkele didn't survive the long break from LX.
Pure. joins bkS
Slako finds his way back to bkS and joins as a trial
Slako has proven himself (more than) worthy and obtains full membership
Sadly, I do not know exactly which year each of the new players was recruited, but I can say that it was between 2011-2014. (See the list above) That list is the chronological order the members joined and/or left/got kicked from the clan
Roster:
Leaders:
Bart and QuiverS
Members:
Ili, Filmonss, Pure and Slako
Clanwar statistics 2014:
Wins:61
Losses: 20
Total: 81
Winning percent: 75%

[http://code.google.com/p/google-breakpad/ Google Breakpad] is a library which automatically gets human readable information out of a crash. This is used in [[OpenLieroX]] in case of a crash to get all important information and to prepare it all together for an automatic crash report.

This article is about a clan that has been tagged dead. Any info is to be considered purely of historical value. Feel free to correct any inaccuracies.
== [bio] - Bring it on == === History === After Exigo joined Nightmare Ninjas - [nn], Calum started up the Bring it on clan ‚Äì [bio] on the 26th of September 2004. Calum went inactive for half a year playing a couple games now and then due to school work and such. (Due to time zones you wouldn‚Äôt see him.) Later on he started recruiting, he managed to get a couple members. (Zeico, Winn3r, Boy, Shredder and Reamus.) He also put in a ranking system. Until the end of 2005 they only are playing games within the clan. After the holidays the clan starts to recruit, Littletodds, Tali and Fleabag are recruited while Boy, Shredder and Zeico quit LieroX. Reamus changes his name to Strikeforce and then shortly after quits LieroX. The clan starts to become really active starting to clanwar and such, the [bio] clan has roughly 27 wins and 6 losses unfortunately these results were erased when the [bio] private forums crashed. Raider and Poonwalk join the clan. When the board crashed we made a new one, shortly after part of the [bio] clan merged into Resolutions Assault ‚Äì |RA| Tali, Poonwalk and Raider left for this. [bio] still went strong having 4 more clanwar wins and no losses before making a better board on Invisionfree. From then on [bio] recruited Terminator and Winn3r changed his name to SiL3nT. Fleabag then changes his name to L3G3ND. At the end of 2006 L3G3ND leaves the clan for [leke] and clan activity in [bio] is depleted. Three months later L3G3ND comes back to [bio] as Shade and continues making it bigger. This time however only Calum was left in the clan, therefore it is just Shade and him. The clan goes steady with two members before recruiting more members. Shade recruits Ragshak, da_nick, Animemasta, Cookman69 and Gang$ta and Kakashi. Calum invites Trinity to the clan and they start having regular games. Gang$ta and Cookman69 decide to retire from LieroX. Shade then recruits Claw, Dish, Platehead, Rusty and kicks Kakashi from the clan for inactivity. We clanwar a little during 2007 ‚Äì 2008 finishing with a total of 8 wins, 1 draw and 11 losses. The clan then goes inactive and after a month the [bio] clan decided together that it was best to retire as a clan. Members have since gone their own ways. == Member list == All currently active members are found here, retired members will be placed on there own. === Founders/Leaders === * Calumoh * Shade === Members === * Animemasta * Bills/Trinity * Claw * Da_nick * Dish * Platehead * Ragshak === Retired Members === * Ben * Cookman69 * Gang$ta * Littletodds * Pixel * Raider * Rusty * SiL3nT * Tali * Zeico == Clan Wars == Although not a complete list this is what we finished with. === War Record === Wins - 8 Draws - 1 Losses - 11 Bring it on - Opponents - Result - Link to more info # Bring it on - Free Fighters - 2>0 - # Bring it on - RSF - 2>0 - # Bring it on - Nothing Much - 2>1 - # Bring it on - Quite Worthy - 1<2 - # Bring it on - (V)en of Valour - 0<2 - # Bring it on - (V)en of Valour - 1<2 - # Bring it on - Junior School Players - 0<2 - # Bring it on - (V)en of Valour - 0<2 - # Bring it on - Army of Glory - 0<2 - # Bring it on - (V)en of Valour - 1<2 - # Bring it on - Smoke that Good Shit - 1<2 - # Bring it on - Army of Glory - 0<2 - # Bring it on - United Warriors - 0<2 - # Bring it on - Silent Killers - 2>1 - # Bring it on - The Nightly Team - 2>0 - # Bring it on - The Nightly Team - 2>0 - # Bring it on - The Nightly Team - 2>0 - # Bring it on - Quality - 1-1 - # Bring it on - Men of Valor - 1<2 - # Bring it on - Champions of Australia - 2>0 - === War statistics === Number of Wars: 20 War victories: 8 War defeats: 11 War draws: 1 War winning percentage: 42.5% Total number of rounds: 47 Number of confirmed rounds: 40 Rounds won: 22 Rounds lost: 25 Winning percentage: 46.8% [[Category:Clans]] [[Category:Retired clans]]

'''BulleT The Blue Sky''' ('''(BtBs)''') (June 2004 - November 2004) was a 100 % loading time playing clan formed by Bu||et. == History == Clan was made in June 2004 by Bu||et as a result of [[Doh|doh]]'s inactivity. In October 2004 a lot of members has left (see Early left BtBs under Members) which caused the final end of BtBs in November 2004 when Bu||et has joined meh clan. In September 2005 Bu||et tried to revive BulleT The Blue Sky but it took him less than a month to realise this will not work. == Members == === Leader === * Bu||eT === Normal members === * Chain * FireBrand * Judge * Miniman * Phoenix Eye * Sanny === Early left BtBs === * AND1 * Andy Tran * Axl-Man * ''Bog_Hog'' * -Liquid- * ReddNuke * Sephiroth '' Wormflesh'' == Clan Wars == === Won === * (BtBs) vs [H.K] (2:0) * (BtBs) vs [B*P] (1:0) * (BtBs) vs ToS_ (2:0) * (BtBs) vs [B*P] (4:1) * (BtBs) vs [B*P] (2:0) === Lost === * (BtBs) vs [TK] (0:2) * (BtBs) vs [wc] (0:2) * (BtBs) vs [H.K] (0:2) == BtBs Level Contest == BtBs has hosted 2 Level Contests. The idea was simple, contestants had to create a new level which was then being judged by several referees. Artist with the most points has won. * [http://www.thegaminguniverse.com/forums/showthread.php?t=14878 BtBs Level Contest GU thread] * [http://www.thegaminguniverse.com/forums/showthread.php?t=17341 BtBs Level Contest 2 GU thread] == External links == * [http://www.thegaminguniverse.com/forums/showthread.php?t=14381 BulleT The Blue Sky GU thread] * [http://www.thegaminguniverse.com/forums/showthread.php?t=25037 BulleT The Blue Sky resurrection GU thread] [[Category:Clans]] [[Category:Retired clans]]

revision.text:
== The Beginning == [C4] was originally founded by Lox, Kins and Dain sometime near April of 2005. The leaders wore Lox and Kins. It was mainly a professional mortar clan, with very skilled mortar players at the time. Things wore going great, with playing mortars and nothing else, everyone was active. In the summer, it got crazy, many people wore active, there wore many [C4] servers, and many members playing competitively. When September arose, the leaders become more and more inactive. September, October, November past, still leaders wore active one day, and not the other. The quitting of the co-leader (anarchypay) made it hard for the clan to go on. In November and December, during the winter holydays, the leaders re-appeared, the concept of PMA(pro-mortar alliance) was created, many pro mortar clans participated, many did not last, and many dominated ([AMB] and waA|), [C4] was ranked last in world of mortars. The leaders got into CW‚Äôs and lost, and members started leaving, in opportunity for grace in other clans. Faisal was introduced as a co-leader, to reshape the clan, and organize the battered system. After the winter breaks, members started to disappear, and the leaders wore also gone, leaving Faisal to manage the whole clan. At the same time the demand of other clans, multi-mod fad became very popular. Weeks past, and recruiting for members who are of skilled in multi-mod became harder and harder, also since [C4] was not going anywhere. Faisal decided in order to get members, he amalgamated with {spz}, turned to [Cz4], very good concept, but leadership problems, made it hard to continue, and was split. Few more weeks after, at the end of February, it was time for Faisal to end it all, [C4] was considered dead.
== [C4] reborn == Faisal, then on May 14, 2006, decided to bring back [C4] with a fellow loyal member of {oOo}, Purplehaze. Only reason for starting up the clan was to gather up the most friendly/ active members. [C4] reborn became a multimod clan, and was mainly active through the summer of 2006.
== Members == === Leaders === * Lox * Kins
=== Co leaders === * Anarchypay * Faisal
=== Regular Members === * DaEvil1 * Nighthawk * Strm * Lord Marek * Baby~Yale * Chaos * TmYn * Jesper * Dain * Noobslayer51 * Swift * Apocalypse * Army_Man
== Reborn Members == === Leaders === * Faisal * [[Purplehaze]]
=== Regular Members === * Chaos * Wildcat * Moo * Assassin/Roxas/Riku/Dusk * Darkazn * Darkangel * FunkyFellow
<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721151439/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/C4 -->

== Real Life == Calvi's name is Alexis. He was born on august, 29th 1990. He lives in France, in Paris. He has one sister, who is married, and a brother. He likes sport, and especially Soccer, Tennis and Volleyball. His favorite music groups are The Strokes, The Dandy Warhols, and Arctic Monkeys, Red Hot Chili Peppers, Scorpions, The Hives.... So, Rock mainly. He knows LieroXtreme since around 2003, when his brother showed him. == Favorite Settings == Calvi is mainly a [[Liero 1.0|liero 1.0]] player, with 20 lt and rifles, on [[Lamda Bunker]] and [[Liero Factory (Revisited|Liero Factory (Revisited)]]/). He doesn't like 100lt much. He loves [[MSF II]], on 100 lt, especially with 4 players on Jukke Dome. == Experience With LieroXtreme == === Different Nicks === His first Nickname was Dark Calvin, because his favorite comic is "Calvin&Hobbes"! He has read all of them ! Since 2006/2007, he changed his nick to Calvi ! === Different Clans === His first clan was PuM. He Didn't stay very long because there were no members. Later, he created a clan with two french peoples and his best friend : [[RaJ]]. At that time, he used to play with [[Ruki]] and [[Raziel]], who came quite often on his server. Once, [[Ruki]] came in his server with the new clan : [[RIP]]. He joined it, bringing with him few [[RaJ]] players, like [[Raziel]]. A few weeks later, he came back alone in [[RaJ]], in order to play with french peoples, but [[RaJ]] died slowly. So, later, he created SoS (Soldiers of Satan) and joined nD (nuclear Destroyers), clans that died also. Later, he came back in [[RIP]], where he still is. He is in [[AP]] too with Xis since 2006 or 2007. That's not a real clan, but more a kind of deal. Indeed, [[Xis]] and Calvi have the same name : Alexis. So, they decided to put [[AP]] at the end of their nick, which means "[[Alexis Power]]" [[Category:Players]]

revision.comment: Imported from Internet Archive Wayback Machine
revision.text:
== Capture the Flag == Capture the Flag (CTF) is a game mode that was introduced between the releases of OpenLieroX beta 3 and beta 4 by Griffin.
It has been non-working since OpenLieroX beta 5 or 6.
== Rules == All players must capture the 'flag' and bring it back to the 'base' or hold it for as long as possible depending on the map.
A point (kill) is gained for returning the flag to the base or holding it for 15 seconds; kills gain no points.
== Maps == Turning a map into a CTF map can be done quite easily with a hex editor however there have not been any maps updated to be CTF compatible since the release of the CTF and the maps that were converted was restored to their original (non-CTF) versions not long after being uploaded to the OpenLieroX SVN Repository. The maps that were converted and the location of where to take the flag are as follows:
Duel - Take the flag to the upper floor in the building in the centre
Section19A - Take the flag to the bunker with a flag on top of it
Snus Industry Ltd - Take the flag to the end of the campspot room
Liero Factory - Take the flag into the brown room near the top
Lamda Bunker - Take the flag into the dead-end room at the centre bottom
Base Fight - Take the flag into the bottom right corner
== Hex editing == Change the first 16 bytes to read "LieroX CTF Level" and append 6 coordinates to the end of the map (the coords must be signed shorts (2 bytes big, twos complement)). The coordinates in order are: FlagSpawnX, FlagSpawnY, BaseTopLeftX, BaseTopLeftY, BaseBottomRightX, BaseBottomRightY.
If you want to have the Flag spawn randomly make its coordinates -1,-1 (0xFFFF, 0xFFFF) and if you don't want a map where you take the flag somewhere but instead want the worms to score by holding the flag the longest make the BaseTopLeftX coordinate -1 (0xFFFF).
For example the Duel level's data was: FF, FF, FF, FF, 92, 00, 6A, 00, AD, 00, 81, 00 This made the flag spawn randomly and set the base (place where you have to get the flag to) to the upper floor of the building in the centre of the map.
<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110118203335/http://www.openlierox.net:80/wiki/index.php/Capture_The_Flag -->

revision.comment: Imported from Internet Archive Wayback Machine
revision.text:
Chat commands can be entered in chat and start with "/". For most commands, you need to be authorized on the server to execute them. To get authorized, there is the "/login" command. Just type "/login ", where "" is the [[Password|password]] you have set in your [[Options.cfg|options.cfg]]. Once you are authorized, you can give also the authorization to other clients on the server, with "/authorize ". Here some other commands (incomplete list yet, feel free to extend): 
/start - starts the game
/lobby - return to lobby
/map  - sets a map
/mod  - sets a mod
/setvar   - sets a variable
/ded  - executes a dedicated command
See the [[Variables|list of variables]] for further information about the variables. See [[Commands|list of commands]] for further information about the dedicated commands. There is also autocompletion via chat commands. Just press the TAB-key at some point. You can use that to get a more full list of all chat commands. For some commands, like "/setvar", "/ded", "/map" or "/mod", it also works for the parameters. For example, you can type 
/map Castle[TAB]
and it will automatically complete. In case of "/ded", it even works for all dedicated commands and even their parameters. Here some more from an older documentation: * /kick - Kicks a player from the server. 
/kick player
/kick id # "reason"
/kick id # kick player
Where # is the number next to the name of the player in the scoreboard.
* /ban - Bans a player from the server. 
/ban player
/ban "player name"
/ban id #
* /mute - Mutes a player on the server 
/mute player
/mute "player name"
/mute id #
* /unmute - Unmutes a player on the server 
/unmute player
/unmute "player name"
/unmute id #
* /setname - Sets the name of yourself or player. 
/setname name (Beta3-4, use /setmyname in Beta5+)
/setname "your name" (Beta3-4, use /setmyname in Beta5+)
/setmyname name (beta5+ only)
/setmyname "your name" (beta5+ only)
/setname id # "Name of player" (only for host in Beta5+)
* /setskin - Sets the skin of yourself or player. 
/setskin "skinname.png" (Beta3-4, use /setmyskin in Beta5+)
/setmyskin "skinname.png" (beta5+ only)
/setskin id # "skinname.png" (only for host in Beta5+)
* /setcolor - Sets the color of yourself or other player 
/setcolor R G B (Beta3-4, use /setmycolour in Beta5+)
/setcolour R G B (Beta3-4, use /setmycolour in Beta5+)
/setmycolor R G B (beta5+ only)
/setmycolour R G B (beta5+ only)
/setcolor id # R G B (only for host in Beta5+)
/setcolour id # R G B (only for host in Beta5+)
R G B - Red Green Blue value, between 0 and 255
* /pm - Sends a private message to a player 
/pm "player name" "message"
/private "player name" "message"
/pm id # "message"
/private id # "message"
* /teampm - Sends a message to your team 
/teampm "message" (beta5+ only)
/teamchat "message"
* /suicide - suicide yourself 
/suicide - suicide yourself (beta3+)
/suicide # - suicide yourself several times (beta3+)
* /spectate - spectate the game 
/spectate - sets your lives to 0 and suicides, so you won't spawn any more (beta6+)

Notice
This article is about a clan that has been tagged dead. Any info is to be considered purely of historical value. Feel free to correct any inaccuracies.
'''[CB] - Clan Butchery''' == Basic info(written by Hurme) == Well, firstly this clan was founded in Fall 2003, although we weren't very active back then. When we started playing LieroX, we decided to found our own clan, because there were five of us in the very beginning. That also secured our survival and so we are still live and kickin' after two years. (Well, not anymore, but we were at the time I wrote this. :P) The founders all live within a 200m radius from each other, and all of them have played the original Liero pretty actively for at least 3 years, except the leaders, who have played Liero VERY actively for 3-4 years. And by "VERY actively", I also mean it. Almost everyday, that is :P. Our strong experience with the original Liero was partially responsible for the idea of our own clan at the first place, and now I can safely say that "Hey, it wasn't so bad idea after all" :P. Our Golden Rule became a standard to all members when we started playing actively in November 2004. That rule has gained us a nice reputation among the LieroX community. (At least among those whose have even heard of us.) The other members have joined [CB] in 2005, and they have showed to be one of those rare exceptions, who can respect our Golden Rule. (Hey, players like them are NOT easy to find :-\ , we had to play for a pretty long time to even find one new member.) And of course they can play atleast as good as the other members. == Members == * [CB]Funkkarimies Leader/Founder, Finland * [CB]Hurme Leader/Founder, Finland * [CB]DeAugsburg Founder, Finland * [CB]Pontius P. Founder, Finland * [CB]Slautter Founder, Finland * [CB]St. Jimmy a.k.a Kloster Member, Germany, * [CB]Ozzy Member, Estonia == Where are they now? == * Hurme and Funkkarimies joined [[Oldschool Players]] * DeAugsburg and Pontius P. play VERY rarely * Slautter, St. Jimmy and Ozzy probably quit == Golden rule of [CB] == Members NEVER call other players noobs, laggers, gays or campers. And they NEVER swear or tell other people when they should die. == Mods == * Liero v1.0 * Liero v1.11 * Shock v1.40 * MSF v1.22 == Levels == * Liero Factory * Dirt level == Clan Wars == * FoH: won once and lost 2-4 times * HC: Won twice * art: Won once * mr: Won once * a.k.@ Lost once [[Category:Clans]] [[Category:Retired clans]]

revision.text:
= Clan Creation = == Synopsis == This little guide is going to show you information so that your clan is not a two week clan. Not everyone stays in a clan very long as it was shown and it still is shown through the community. Hopefully with this guide, you will get some advices on what and what not to do when starting and leading a clan.
== Clan Information == Your clan should be powerful, and look good too. Here is a list of things that have helped many clans along the way.
* '''When making a clan, you should share information about your clan in a new post.''' * '''Add the rules of your clan, what you expect in your players''' * '''Add contact for people who need to get ahold of you''' * '''Update your clan thread.''' * '''Be neat, make it look good.''' * Add information about your clan, how it started, why, when, etc.. * Show who the leaders are, members, trials, etc... * Show how many people you are going to let join your clan. * Tell when recuritment is open or closed. * Make a clan war list inside your post, showing what you won, and what you lost. * Post who hosts in your clan, there server names, what they play, etc... * You might wanna add your clan to the Clan List.
== The Clan == Just a list of stuff regarding your clan, and some helpful ideas.
* '''Choose a good name, try not to copy much.''' * '''Make sure your clan will be active.''' * '''Pick people you have played with before. People you know in game.''' * '''Have good attitudes and trust in your clan members/mates. Talk to each other outside of LX.''' * '''Practice with your members.''' * '''Teach your clan mebers to respect other players and clans.''' * '''Be loyal, don't jump to another clan just for fame.''' * '''Remember to have fun.''' * '''Be active. Leaders and Players.''' * Practice as many mods as possible and don't limit yourselfs to one mod. * Having a set group of members is a good idea. * Don't ditch a clan because you lost a few cws, or member leaving. * Participate in CW's to gain more experience. * Make sure your in control of your clan. * Don't push your members around, don't flame them cause you lost a match. * Be comfertable with your clan. * Make sure you have contact with your members. * Remember that the players you recruit represent your clan, so don't recruit anyone that could make your clan look bag (eg. by bad behaviour)
== Thank you == This is just some ideas, that should be taken into consideration when creating a clan. You do not need to follow any of these rules, clan creation is completely up to the person and should be considered that way. This is just some ideas, and refrences that might help you and your clan.
[[Category:Guides]]
<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721121624/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/Clan_Creation -->

= The LieroX Clan Family Tree = The family tree is a project started by [[User AnubisBlessing|AnubisBlessing]] which has as it's goal to map the development of clan creation in the Liero Xtreme community.
[[File:Family_Tree_20080402.jpg|The clan relationsships as collected up until April 2008]]
The clan relationsships as collected up until April 2008
== Progress == Note: * The mapping is not assumed to be complete, but rather shows what clans have been added to the map. * Inheritance is indicated by the following syntax: '''Decendant''' <- Ancestor1(Founder1) <- Ancestor2(Founder2) <- ... <- Ancestorn(Foundern) * Multiple arrows indicate multiple inheritance, not a chain. * If a clan has no known ancestors, it will be called a mother clan. ** "No known ancestors" can indicate that research has not gotten that far, or simply that the clan is an genuine mother clan. === Mapped clan relationships: === If two trees don't seem to be interwebbed, they will be posted under different sections named after the topmost clan. The clans in the list are approximately listed by age as far as possible. ==== "UT" tree ==== : : '''UT''' : ''(Branches off into "TsL" tree)'' : '''RIP''' <- ToS (Ruki), UT (Shady) : '''WaN''' <- RIP (Spade-AU) : '''Osp''' <- WaN (Zapp) <- WaS (Kossu) <- TK?(Z01) : ''(Connects to "TsL" tree)'' : '''waA''' : '''nG''' : '''HL''' <- nG (Chase, Beast) : '''e3''' <- WaN (Anubis) <- waA (RuNyoufool) <- nG (Fierce) : '''OwZ''' <- waA (Gaston, Wander) <- leke (QuiverS, Swift) : '''hB''' <- OwZ (Kurt, QuiverS) : '''Jsp''' (Osp child clan) : ''(Connects with "T3" tree)'' : '''rS''' <- e3 (Nico) ==== "ToS" tree ==== : : '''ToS''' : '''USA''' <- GR (Halo) : '''ALT''' : '''meh''' <- ToS (Cloud) : '''NB-AT''' <- USA (Gigolo) : '''XpL''' <- ALT (Kray) : '''LcD''' <- meh (Cloud) <- ALT (Avye) <- NB-AT (Gigolo) : '''1st''' <- ALT (Ajay) : '''m1''' <- ALT (LegendKiller) : '''Vp''' : '''GC''' <- LcD (Gigolo, Tizzle) : '''V''' <- GC (Tizzle) <- AoD (Asrack) : '''aD''' <- V (Magus) : '''StGs''' <- V (Exigo) : '''AoG''' <- Vp (Z01) <- ALT (Gyogyi) ==== "TsL" tree ==== : : '''TsL''' : '''UT''' : ''Branches off into'' UT ''tree'' : '''WsW''' : '''NH''' <- UT (Tafka) <- WsW (Criv3r) : '''TeS''' <- TsL (Wormi, Cl!FF) <- NH (Tafka) : '''T3''' <- TeS (Tafka) <- ? (Crusader) <- ? (Lil Bill) : '''Tps''' <- T3 (Twister) <- Jsp (Nico) : ''(Connects with "UT" tree)'' ==== "wc tree" ==== To be merged with UT tree? : : '''wc''' : '''TK''' : '''MiB''' <- wc (Kot, Dimon), <- M@kss (?) : '''WaS''' < - TK (QuafaS) : ''Branches off into'' UT ''tree'' : '''pC''' <- wc (Kemp) <- WaN (Morbid) <- Osp (QuafaS) : '''ew''' <- MiB (Flame) ==== Small trees or unplaced clans ==== : : '''erm''' : '''heh''' : '''42''' <- erm (BNX) <- heh (Strider) : : '''doh''' : '''BtBs''' <- doh (Bu||et) : '''AW''' <- BtBs (Miniman) : '''MW''' <-BtBs (Andy Tran, -Liquid-) : '''AMW''' <- AW (Miniman) <- MW (Andy Tran, -Liquid-) : : '''WoF''' : '''BH45''' : '''Uw''' <- WoF (?) <- BH45 (?) : : '''VIP''' : '''F-12'"''' : '''aC''' <- VIP (Thor) : '''mD''' <- F-12 (Syphael) <- aC (Mashkito) === Contributors === [[User AnubisBlessing|AnubisBlessing]] Spectro [[User Asrack|Asrack]] [[User Ruki|Ruki]] [[Category:Projects]] [[Category:Liero Xtreme Community]]

revision.text:
'''Note''': This list isnt used anymore, please add your clan on the new [[Category Clans|clan list category]]
When editing this page use the header to make a list, don't throw a bunch of random signs to make a header. Keep it clean. Also, don't worry about retired clans, just throw them in here anyway. Note how the alphabetical order is there for a reason. If you are to make a member list, just mention the member that have been in that clan. The info will only grow old, and no one wants to go in and edit it each time a new member joins or leaves...

revision.comment: Imported from Internet Archive Wayback Machine
revision.text:
'''Clanbase''' (April 2005 - September 2005) was a first working and successful clan ladders system in LieroX community, created by [[Werrock]]. == History == The idea of having clan ladders was brought to LieroX community by [[Werrock]] in February 2005. At first quite many players were sceptical about having such a system but individual supporters like Kalma and [[BNX]] put a lot of effort into realisation. In March 2005 Clanbase was opened for every clan which would match the criteria to join. Clanbase was coded by Werrock and being hosted by BNX at [[LieroX.net]], both were administrators. Kalma, Ruki and Anubis were moderators who could accept or reject new clans and help with Clanbase to function normally. Raziel also helped with graphics. In April 2005 Clanbase system was drasticaly updated. More ladders were created and several important guidelines for clans were set up as well as rules regarding playing matches were set up more strictly. It was happening that players were creating and registering fake clans just to boost up points with their primary clans. Also a lot of arguments were being brought up to Werrock regarding the game play itself. In September 2005 administrators of Clanbase were finally fed up with immature participants and Werrock has removed the Clanbase, leaving a goodbye note for several people who were helping with Clanbase. == Staff members == * [[Werrock]] * [[BNX]] * Kalma * Ruki * Anubis == List of ladders == * Liero 1.0 * Liero 1.0 Combo * Liero 1.11 * MSF 1.22 * Foodfight 0.6 * Warhammer 0.11 * Cruel 0.96 * 8 Bit-Warfare * Modern 0.9 * MatrixMod 0.05b * Shock v1.41 Air == Rules == Leader of the clan would register his clan in Clanbase. Only one person had the position of leader in Clanbase but among clan members he could choose a trustee, which had same functions as a co-leader. Player was not allowed to play for more than one clan in Clanbase as well as it was forbidden to register 2 different clans for individual player. Clans had to match the criteria to be accepted in Clanbase when sending the application form. Minimum ammount of members was required, clan had to exist for a certain time period and clan had to have a home page or at least a thread at Gaming Universe. Staff members were deciding if a clan would be accepted or not. Shortly after Clanbase was opened strict rules for participants were set up. Clan wars had to consist only of 2 games with loading time between 20% and 100% being chosen by both clans. Normally each clan would pick their home settings for one match but contestants were given freedom of choice how to decide about settings. There was a list of weapons that had to be banned in each ladders and only levels in the Clanbase list could be played in a clan war. Bonuses had to be turned off. All the games were played with 10 lives as 2 vs 2 or more, duels would not count in ladders. === Ranking system === Clanbase ranking system was based on ELO system. Changes in rating were changing according to the match results (a victory, a defeat or a draw). Like in any ELO system, how the points were given or taken after a win or a defeat depended on the rating difference between first and second opponent before the match took a place. === Levels known to be on the official Clanbase list === * Bookworm * Campus * Castle Strike * Cheese v2 * Dirt * Fossil Facility * Gamma Bunker * Jail Break * Jukke Dome * Lamda Bunker * Liero Factory * Liero Factory Revisited * Lieros of Caribbean * Section 19A * Snow * Spa[[Toilet Warriors|e Station * Tetris v2 * Tomb of Wormses == Standings == Without any doubt [Toilet Warriors]] were the all time winners of Clanbase. They were in the top of Combo and Noncombo Liero v1.0 ladders with a giant lead infront of all the other clans. They have retired with just one loss and being replaced then by Pugnacitas on the top in July 2005. During the Clanbase season second place was being fighted for by [[Rot In Pieces]], [[Hell Worms]] and [[We are Noobs]]. === Liero v1.0 (Noncombo) ladder in May 2005 === [[File:V1.0_ladders.PNG]] === Liero v1.0 Combo ladder in May 2005 === [[File:V1.0_combo_ladders.PNG]] == Controversy == In April 2005 the idea to separate the Liero v1.0 ladder into Combo and Noncombo ladders was presented to the community. A poll was made at [[Gaming Universe]] for members to vote. Idea was discriminating clans which were playing both loading times. A lot of clans played clan wars as a mixture of loading times. One game was usually being played in Rifle combo and second one in Limited 100 lt. With separated ladders this would not be possible as ladders would only allow clan wars consisting of just one setting. The strongest argument for the idea was Combos variating from Noncombos too much. Although the idea of separation has won with 26 votes against 13 at Gaming Universe, a new poll was made at Clanbase home page where only clans involved could cast a vote. Poll ended with 7 votes against 4 for splitting the ladders. One clan was banned from the Clanbase which made it a final of 6 to 4 victory for the separation. As the result 2 new ladders were created - Combo (20 lt) and Noncombo (100 lt) one. Standings in Liero v1.0 ladder as they were before splitting up were being transfered into Noncombo ladder when Combo ladder was started from scratch. A new rule regarding number of matches in clan wars was set up. Clan wars would consist only of 2 games so they could end up as a tie. Lower ranked clan would gain some points in this case and higher ranked clan would lose some. After the decision was made there was still some disagreement but as time has shown the solution turned out well. 
The Solution
All clans who play in lierox 1.0 ladder stay on same ladder. There will be no separate
ladder for combo and non-combo.

Here is why:
# It would be unfair towards the clans if the ladder would be reseted and it would
start over. Ladders are NEVER reseted. Also it would be unfair if the points already
(no matter below or above 1000) would be transfered in both/single ladder(s) since
if not all but most of the clan wars so far have had mixture of combo/non-combo games.

# Since both combo and non-combo games are fought with same weapons and levels,
that is with same mod, there is no concrete reason to separete them in to different
ladders. These two styles are optional choices in the clan matches. Same kind of
optional choice would be: "only one same weapon can be chosen in your weaponry" or
u "can use rifles only". Altough the difference between PURE combo and non-combo game
is huge it is no where near as huge as playing one game with liero 1.0 and one game
with some random mod like Trick or Treat :) ..Thus additionally strenghtening the
decision.

# Dividing ladders in to more ladders only weakens the value of each one of them and
also it will reduce the activity in ladders and make clans a huge burden of games to
keep up with. Liero 1.0 is a ongoing competition about who masters the liero 1.0 mod
in all its varieties of styles. Clans should practise and recruit people who can play
good in  different styles.. This will grow the clans and maybe even meld clans
together to even stronger bonds  that will help them last more than day or 2.

Also there would be some silly incidents like clans playing a 100% cw against
eachother today for one ladder and same clans playing a 20% combo cw next day
for the other ladder. This is gona leave u a question, why cant these games be
played on same Liero1.0 ladder. ~ Kalma, presenting the solution
== External links == * [http://www.thegaminguniverse.com/forums/showthread.php?t=21686 Clanbase GU thread] * [http://www.thegaminguniverse.com/forums/showthread.php?t=24703 Clanbase quitting GU thread] * [http://www.thegaminguniverse.com/forums/showthread.php?t=22135 Clanladders discussion GU thread] [[Category:Liero Xtreme Community]]

revision.comment: Imported from Internet Archive Wayback Machine
revision.text:
== Clans == Clans are a group of players who wear a similar tag. Clans usually clan war each other to show who is better by keeping track of the clan wars in there clan threads or there own separate forum. Some of the greatest examples can be found on the [[Clan List]].
=== Making a Clan === There is no special magic in making a clan but you do need to take care of it, and your members. You should think carefully about who you are adding in, and learn about the person before doing so. LieroX is based on respect. If someone is not respected, it can make your clan look bad. This is also noted by anyone who's played LieroX long enough to watch people literally change there name to get a better reputation with others.
You can then get a clan thread on OpenLieroX.net. [/ OLX].
== Tips == Clan Information Your clan should be powerful, and look good too. Here is a list of things that have helped many clans along the way.
* When making a clan, you should share information about your clan in a new post. * Add the rules of your clan, what you expect in your players * Add contact for people who need to get ahold of you * Update your clan thread. * Be neat, make it look good. * Add information about your clan, how it started, why, when, etc.. * Show who the leaders are, members, trials, etc... * Show how many people you are going to let join your clan. * Tell when recuritment is open or closed. * Make a clan war list inside your post, showing what you won, and what you lost. * Post who hosts in your clan, there server names, what they play, etc... * You might wanna add your clan to the Clan List.
The Clan Just a list of stuff regarding your clan, and some helpful ideas.
* Choose a good name, try not to copy much. * Make sure your clan will be active. * Pick people you have played with before. People you know in game. * Have good attitudes and trust in your clan members/mates. Talk to each other outside of LX. * Practice with your members. * Teach your clan mebers to respect other players and clans. * Be loyal, don't jump to another clan just for fame. * Remember to have fun. * Be active. Leaders and Players. * Practice as many mods as possible and don't limit yourselfs to one mod. * Having a set group of members is a good idea. * Don't ditch a clan because you lost a few cws, or member leaving. * Participate in CW's to gain more experience. * Make sure your in control of your clan. * Don't push your members around, don't flame them cause you lost a match. * Be comfertable with your clan. * Make sure you have contact with your members. * Remember that the players you recruit represent your clan, so don't recruit anyone that could make your clan look bag (eg. by bad behaviour)
Check out the [[Clan Creation]] for more usefull information.
<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20130324070447/http://www.openlierox.net:80/wiki/index.php/Clans -->

revision.comment: Imported from Internet Archive Wayback Machine
revision.text:
== Combo == Combo is the use of more than one weapon in a quick time. It's switching weapons to shoot quickly rather than taking the time to choose weapons slowly and fire. To do this you hold your change weapon button, and press backwards or forwards a few times while pressing fire to shoot them all in what seems to be a combination. The reason this is called combo is because you usually combined the same weapon more than once. Examples of these would be [[Rifles]] and [[Mortars]].
<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721141852/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/Combo -->

revision.comment: Imported from Internet Archive Wayback Machine
revision.text:
OLX supports a set of command line parameters. You get a list (which could be incomplete though) via the parameter "-help". This is the output of 0.58 beta8: 
available parameters:
   -connect srv  Connects to the server
   -exec cmd     Executes the command in console
   -opengl       OpenLieroX will use OpenGL for drawing
   -noopengl     Explicitly disable using OpenGL
   -dedicated    Dedicated mode
   -nojoystick   Disable Joystick support
   -nosound      Disable sound
   -window       Run in window mode
   -fullscreen   Run in fullscreen mode
   -skin         Turns on new skinned GUI - it's unfinished yet
   -noskin       Turns off new skinned GUI
Esp. "-exec " may be interesting because you can execute any command you want. See the [[Commands|list of commands]] for further information. You can have multiple "-exec" parameters. For example, this will start up a simple [[Dedicated server|dedicated server]] without any script: 
openlierox -dedicated -script /dev/null -exec startlobby -exec "addbots 2" -exec startgame
Or if you want a shortcut to connect to your favourit server with your default worm: 
openlierox -connect server.az2000.de

revision.comment: Imported from Internet Archive Wayback Machine
revision.text:
OLX comes with a powerful intern command execution system. Those commands can be entered via the [[Ingame console|ingame console]], via the real console (i.e. stdin) on systems which support that (all except Windows) in [[Dedicated server|dedicated mode]] (i.e. OLX started with "-dedicated" parameter), via [[Chat commands|chat command]] ("/ded "), via a [[Dedicated script|dedicated script]] or via [[Command line parameters|command line parameter]] ("-exec "). You can get a list of all commands via the command "help" or "longhelp" and further information about each command can be get with "help ". == List of commands in OpenLieroX/0.59_beta9 == * addBot [botprofile] [ai-diff] [inGame:*true/false] ===== add bot to game * addBots number [ai-diff] ===== add bots to game * addHuman [profile] ===== add human player to game * authorizeWorm id ===== authorize worm * banWorm id [reason] ===== ban worm * chatMsg text ===== give a global chat message * connect server[:port] [player] ===== join a server * debugFindProblems ===== do some system checks and print problems - no output means everything seems ok * disconnect ===== disconnect from server or exit server * dumpConnections ===== dump connections of server * dumpGameSettings ===== dump game settings (all layers) * dumpGameState ===== dump game state * dumpSysState ===== dump system state * findSpot [(x,y)] ===== find randm free spot in map (close to pos) * getComputerWormList ===== get computer worm list * getFullFileName relativefilename ===== get full filename * getGameState ===== get game state * getVar variable ===== read variable * getWormHealth id ===== get worm health * getWormIp id ===== get worm IP * getWormList ===== get worm list * getWormLives id ===== get worm lives * getWormLocationInfo id ===== get worm location info * getWormName id ===== get worm name * getWormPing id ===== get worm ping * getWormPos id ===== get worm position * getWormProps id ===== get worm properties * getWormScore id ===== get worm score * getWormSkin id ===== get worm skin * getWormTeam id ===== get worm team * getWormVelocity id ===== get worm velocity * getWriteFullFileName relativefilename ===== get writeable full filename * gotoLobby ===== go to lobby * help [command] ===== list available commands or shows desription/usage of specific command * irc text ===== send message to IRC chat * kickBot [reason] ===== kick bot from game * kickBots [reason] ===== kick all bots from game * kickWorm id [reason] ===== kick worm * killBots ===== kill all bots out of game * listMaps ===== list all available maps * listMods ===== list all available mods * loadConfig [filename] ===== load config file * longhelp ===== list available commands and description * map filename ===== set map * mapInfo ===== get map info * mod filename ===== set mod * msg text ===== print message on stdout * muteWorm id ===== mute worm * privateMsg id text ===== give a private message to a worm * quit ===== quit game * saveConfig [filename] ===== save current config * saveConfigSection section filename ===== save a specific config section * script [script] [args] ===== load extern dedicated script * selectWeapons id ===== select weapons for worm * serverName new-name ===== rename server * serverSideHealth true/false ===== turn on/off server-side health * setVar variable value ===== set variable * setViewport mode=follow|cycle|freelook|actioncam [wormID] [mode2] [wormID2] ===== Set viewport mode * setWormCanAirJump id true/false ===== enable/disable air jump for worm * setWormCanUseNinja id true/false ===== (dis)allow worm to use ninja * setWormColor id r g b ===== Change the color of a worm * setWormDamageFactor id factor ===== set worm damagefactor * setWormLives id (-2: unlimited, -1: outofgame, >=0: lives) ===== set worm lives * setWormName id name [notify:*true/false] ===== Rename a worm * setWormShieldFactor id factor ===== set worm shieldfactor * setWormSkin id skin ===== Change the skin of a worm * setWormSpeedFactor id factor ===== set worm speedfactor * setWormTeam id team ===== set worm team * signal ===== send custom signal to dedicated script * sound true/false ===== enable or disable sound * spawnWorm id [pos] ===== spawn worm * startGame ===== start game * startLobby [serverport] ===== start server lobby * suicide [#kills] ===== suicide first local human worm * unmuteWorm id ===== unmute worm * unstuck ===== unstuck first local human worm * version ===== print game version info * volume 0-100 ===== set sound volume * wait seconds|lobby|game command [args] [ ; command2 args... ] ===== Execute commands after wait * wantsJoin true/false ===== enable/disable wants to join messages * whoIs worm-id ===== get some info about a connection * nextSignal ===== This command will be very important for you when building your dedicated script. The signal OpenLieroX returns will be an ingame event, like 'backtolobby' or 'lobbystarted'. Read more here: [[Dedicated script|http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/Dedicated_script]] == Usage Examples == * This will turn the player with id 3 into a very fast pink bunny that can not be killed but can't hurt anyone either. (Extremely usefull :P) 
setWormSkin 3 "Bunny.png"
setWormColor 3 200 100 200
setWormSpeedFactor 3 3
setWormShieldFactor 3 999
setWormDamageFactor 3 0
* unstuck - move the worm stucked in non-destroyable terrain to nearest free spot. 
unstuck
* ssh - turn Server Side Health on/off on server 
ssh on/off
ssh true/false
ssh 1/0
ssh yes/no
* wantsjoin - allow "player wants join the server" message on server 
wantsjoin on/off
wantsjoin true/false
wantsjoin 1/0
wantsjoin yes/no
* servername - set new server name 
servername newname
servername "new name"
* help - outputs list of console commands 
help
* version - outputs game version 
version
about
* quit - quits the game (actually quits to main menu only) 
quit
exit
* volume - sets sound volume 
volume # - # is number from 0 to 100
* sound - toggles the sound on/off 
sound on/off
sound true/false
sound 1/0
sound yes/no
